DeepPhe software

Downloads

Choose the DeepPhe product that fits your work. Installers are listed first; supporting tools and source archives remain available below.

Research and translational studies DeepPhe Translational Install DeepPhe for research cohorts and translational workflows. View downloads Cancer registry workflows DeepPhe-CR Get the final release for registrar and registry applications. View downloads

Research and translational studies

DeepPhe Translational

For translational studies, research cohorts, and visual review of extracted cancer phenotypes.

The installers include DeepPhe Translational and DeepPhe Visualizer.

Release documentation

Recommended

Installers

Choose your operating system to install the complete research software.

Version 7.1 Updated Jul 13, 2026

Windows installer DeepPhe_windows-7.1.exe macOS installer DeepPhe-7.1.dmg Linux installer DeepPhe_linux-x64-7.1.sh
Tools, examples, and source code Open this section when you need individual components, sample data, or source archives.

Examples

Sample files for trying the DeepPhe Translational workflow.

Version 7.1 Updated Jul 8, 2026

Examples package DeepPhe-examples.zip

DeepPhe DB Pipeline

Load DeepPhe results into the database used by the Data API and Visualizer.

Version 7.1 Updated Jul 8, 2026

Windows DeepPheVizDbCreator-windows-x86_64.exe macOS (Intel) DeepPheVizDbCreator-macos-x86_64 macOS (Apple silicon) DeepPheVizDbCreator-macos-arm64 Linux DeepPheVizDbCreator-linux-x86_64

DeepPhe Data API

Serve database content to the DeepPhe Visualizer and other applications.

Version 7.1 Updated Jul 8, 2026

Windows dphe-data-api-win-x64.exe macOS (Intel) dphe-data-api-macos-x64 macOS (Apple silicon) dphe-data-api-macos-arm64 Linux dphe-data-api-linux-x64

Cancer registry workflows

DeepPhe-CR

For registrar case abstraction, cancer registry workflows, and integration with registry systems.

This is the final DeepPhe-CR software release.

Release documentation
